ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait after the selection stops changing before copying. Lower values feel more immediate; higher values reduce clipboard churn during fast keyboard selection.
ast.target: 选择停止变化后等待多久再进行复制。较低的值感觉更即时；较高的值可减少快速键盘选择期间的剪贴板变动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Briefly display a toast each time text is copied. Handy while tuning settings; most users will want this off.
ast.target: 每次复制文本时短暂显示一个提示。调整设置时很方便；大多数用户会希望关闭此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also fire after a touch-based selection on mobile. iOS restricts clipboard writes outside of direct user gestures, so this may silently fail in some contexts.
ast.target: 在移动设备上基于触摸的选择后也会触发。iOS限制在直接用户手势之外的剪贴板写入，因此在某些情况下可能会静默失败。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore every setting on this page to its default value.
ast.target: 将此页面上的所有设置恢复为默认值。
